title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving OpsPal's reliability and setup experience. The platform now automatically cleans up outdated files and fixes missing dependencies during startup, reducing manual maintenance. Additionally, HubSpot integrations received important compatibility updates, and Salesforce workflows now better handle record types and dynamic forms.

entries.headline: Platform automatically cleans up old files during updates
details: Removes outdated cache files older than 7 days
Cleans up stuck session files older than 5 minutes
Alerts when memory files become too large

entries.headline: Improved Salesforce metadata and record type handling
details: Prevents field conflicts when Dynamic Forms are active
Automatically assigns new record types to System Administrator profile
Reduces workflow blocking from routing requirements

entries.headline: Platform automatically fixes missing dependencies at startup
details: Installs required packages automatically during session start
Shows clear error messages when installations fail
Provides manual fix commands when needed

entries.headline: Resolved false missing package errors during startup
